full_text:
Xi Zuochi 習鑿齒
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xi Zuochi (習鑿齒). Authored the Han/Jin historical text,Han Jin chunqiu. Xi Zuochi was an historic figure affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Xi Zuochi lived during the Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
